findings.title: Production Homepage HTTP 500
findings.evidence: Lighthouse error: Status code 500 on root document.
findings.impact: Lighthouse and public users crash on page load.
findings.recommendation: Check error.log internal to container, debug recent template inclusions.

findings.title: Raw $wpdb usage tightly coupled to Service layer
findings.evidence: 541 instances of $wpdb references outside of repositories directory.
findings.impact: Codebase is highly brittle and cannot be properly unit tested with mocks.
findings.recommendation: Migrate queries into dedicated Repository DAO classes.

findings.title: No Test Suite or Static Analysis
findings.evidence: phpunit and phpstan not found in environment.
findings.impact: Regressions are guaranteed during refactoring phases.
findings.recommendation: Install PHPUnit and PHPStan, integrate block pipeline in GitHub Actions.
